title: BrandComplianceInput
description: Validated inputs for brand-compliance skill execution

action.description: The compliance audit action to perform

contentPath.description: Path to the content file or asset to audit

contentText.description: Raw content text to audit (alternative to contentPath)

brandGuidelinesPath.description: Path to brand guidelines document (optional; uses defaults if omitted)

voiceProfile.description: Target brand voice profile scores (optional; uses defaults if omitted)

channels.description: List of channels to evaluate for cross-channel coherence (e.g., ['web', 'instagram', 'print'])

outputPath.description: Path to write the compliance report (optional; defaults to stdout)
